mainEntity.name: Can I get permanent disability for reduced lung function from paint fumes in Farmington?
mainEntity.text: Can I get permanent disability for reduced lung function from paint fumes in Farmington?

acceptedAnswer.text: Yes, Utah awards PPI 5-30% based on AMA FVC/FEV1 reductions from paint isocyanates, plus retraining if unemployable.

suggestedAnswer.text: Farmington painters document via serial spirometry. Benefits: $200-$400/week TPD, lump-sum PPI $50K avg. Vocational expert for job loss. Avoid release without rating.

name: Permanent Disability for Paint Fume Lung Damage in Farmington
description: Yes, Utah awards PPI 5-30% based on AMA FVC/FEV1 reductions from paint isocyanates, plus retraining if unemployable.
